title: Support appending to queue via `[]`
body:
According to IEEE 1800-2023 7.10.1, one can append an element to a queue by setting one-past-end element.

With this patch it mostly works, but there are some edge cases. One that I know of is if you pass that element as `ref` to a function, it should append only if the function writes to it (currently it always appends). Solving that would be quite hard and probably not worth it for now.
